"D:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\quick_test8.dir/objects.a
D:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\quick_test8.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\quick_test8.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\G__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\quick_test8.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o quick_test8.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libquick_test8.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\quick_test8.dir\linklibs.rsp
